---
title: "About"
about:
  template: solana
  #links:
   # - icon: twitter
   #   text: Twitter
   #   href: https://twitter.com
   # - icon: linkedin
   #   text: LinkedIn
   #   href: https://linkedin.com
   # - icon: github
   #   text: Github
   #   href: https://github.com

---
My name is Brendan Mallery. I am a 3rd year PhD student at Tufts University, working on applications of optimal transport to data science and machine learning. I have also done work in graph curvature, topological data analysis and the study of time-evolving networks.
